properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 19/15
ANDOYA SPACE SENTER WILL LAUNCH 1 SCIENTIFIC AND UNTIL 14 METEOROLOGICAL ROCKETS
SCHEDULED FROM 1900 TO 0200 UTC DAILY FROM 03 MAR TO 18 MAR 15.
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING
TWO HAZARD AREAS.
AREA 1.  A SECTOR WITH ORIGIN IN POS. 69-17.64N 016-01.11E
              TRUE BEARING: 310-348. SECTOR LENGTH: 9 NM
AREA 2. AN AREA WITHIN THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES.
    A. 69-21N 015-27E
    B. 69-30N 016-15E
    C. 70-04N 015-57E
    D. 70-34N 014-49E
    E. 70-07N 012-56E
    F. 69-37N 014-21E
    G. 69-21N 015-27E
NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 02/15 REEFERS. NOTE NEW DATE 03 MAR TO 18 MAR 15.
